Docs.param: Name of the deployment.
The request context, which can override default behaviors of the client pipeline on a per-call basis.
Docs.summary:
[Protocol Method] Get a deployed model.
This protocol method allows explicit creation of the request and processing of the response for advanced scenarios.
Please try the simpler convenience overload with strongly typed models first.
Docs.returns: The response returned from the service.
Docs.exception: is an empty string, and was expected to be non-empty.
Service returned a non-success status code.

Docs.param: Model publisher to filter models by.
Model name (the publisher specific name) to filter models by.
Flag to include models from connections in response.
The number of result items to return.
The number of result items to skip.
The maximum number of result items per page.
The request context, which can override default behaviors of the client pipeline on a per-call basis.
Docs.summary:
[Protocol Method] List all deployed models in the project
This protocol method allows explicit creation of the request and processing of the response for advanced scenarios.
Please try the simpler convenience overload with strongly typed models first.
Docs.returns: The from the service containing a list of objects. Details of the body schema for each item in the collection are in the Remarks section below.
Docs.exception: Service returned a non-success status code.
